rationale: The proposed change increases an existing property tax exemption; it does not impose a tax based on wealth or net worth. Art. VIII, §25 prohibits new wealth taxes, not adjustments to existing ad valorem exemptions.
quote: The legislature may not impose a tax based on the wealth or net worth of an individual or family, including a tax based on the difference between the assets and liabilities of an individual or family.
_note: No conflict. Homestead exemption adjustment is unrelated to the wealth-tax prohibition.
